languages.text: "Ваша попытка оттянуть неизбежное столь же ясна, сколь и нелепа. Я позволю вам говорить не в силу вашего титула: пред лицом Бога-Императора все еретики равны. Я даю вам слово лишь затем, чтобы вы сами осознали тщетность своего намерения".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша попытка оттянуть неизбежное столь же ясна, сколь и нелепа. Я позволю вам говорить не в силу вашего титула: пред лицом Бога-Императора все еретики равны. Я даю вам слово лишь затем, чтобы вы сами осознали тщетность своего намерения".

languages.text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."
languages.original_text: "Ваша попытка оттянуть неизбежное столь же ясна, сколь и нелепа. Я позволю вам говорить не в силу вашего титула: пред лицом Бога-Императора все еретики равны. Я даю вам слово лишь затем, чтобы вы сами осознали тщетность своего намерения".

traits.locale_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

"Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

"Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

languages.text: “你想要拖延这不可避免之事，这心思既明显又可笑。我允许你开口，不是因为你的身份。在神皇眼中，所有异端没有区别。我给你这个机会，只是为了让你自己明白，你的意图是何等地不堪一击。”
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: “你想要拖延这不可避免之事，这心思既明显又可笑。我允许你开口，不是因为你的身份。在神皇眼中，所有异端没有区别。我给你这个机会，只是为了让你自己明白，你的意图是何等地不堪一击。”

languages.text: « Votre tentative de repousser l'inéluctable est aussi évidente que ridicule. Si je vous autorise à parler, ce n'est pas en vertu de votre titre : aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu, tous les hérétiques se valent. Non, si je vous laisse cette chance, c'est pour que vous preniez conscience par vous-mêmes de l'inanité de vos manigances. »
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: « Votre tentative de repousser l'inéluctable est aussi évidente que ridicule. Si je vous autorise à parler, ce n'est pas en vertu de votre titre : aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu, tous les hérétiques se valent. Non, si je vous laisse cette chance, c'est pour que vous preniez conscience par vous-mêmes de l'inanité de vos manigances. »

languages.text: "Bu gördüğüm kaçınılmazı geciktirme çabası pek gülünç. Konuşacağız ancak mevki farkından ötürü değil... Tanrı İmparator'un gözünde tüm kâfirler eşittir. Bu fırsatı tanıyacağım çünkü niyetiniz nafile ve bunu anlamanız gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: "Bu gördüğüm kaçınılmazı geciktirme çabası pek gülünç. Konuşacağız ancak mevki farkından ötürü değil... Tanrı İmparator'un gözünde tüm kâfirler eşittir. Bu fırsatı tanıyacağım çünkü niyetiniz nafile ve bunu anlamanız gerekiyor."

languages.text: «Sus intentos por retrasar lo inevitable son tan evidentes como ridículos. Le permitiré hablar, pero no por su título: a ojos del Dios Emperador, todos los herejes son iguales. Solo le doy esta oportunidad para que usted y los suyos asimilen la futilidad de estos esfuerzos».
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: «Sus intentos por retrasar lo inevitable son tan evidentes como ridículos. Le permitiré hablar, pero no por su título: a ojos del Dios Emperador, todos los herejes son iguales. Solo le doy esta oportunidad para que usted y los suyos asimilen la futilidad de estos esfuerzos».

languages.text: "Euer Versuch, das Unvermeidbare hinauszuzögen, ist ebenso offensichtlich wie lächerlich. Ich gestatte Euch nicht wegen Eures Titel, zu sprechen: In den Augen des Gottimperators sind alle Ketzer gleich. Ich gebe Euch diese Chance nur, damit Ihr die Sinnlosigkeit Eures Unterfangens selbst erkennt."
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Versuch, das Unvermeidbare hinauszuzögen, ist ebenso offensichtlich wie lächerlich. Ich gestatte Euch nicht wegen Eures Titel, zu sprechen: In den Augen des Gottimperators sind alle Ketzer gleich. Ich gebe Euch diese Chance nur, damit Ihr die Sinnlosigkeit Eures Unterfangens selbst erkennt."

languages.text: 「避けられない運命を遅らせる試みは、明らかで、同時に愚かです。貴方の発言を許すのは、貴方の肩書きではなく、神皇帝の目には、すべての異端者は平等です。貴方の意図の無意味さを自覚する機会を与えるためだけに、この機会を与えます。」
languages.original_text: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."

traits.locale_text: 「避けられない運命を遅らせる試みは、明らかで、同時に愚かです。貴方の発言を許すのは、貴方の肩書きではなく、神皇帝の目には、すべての異端者は平等です。貴方の意図の無意味さを自覚する機会を与えるためだけに、この機会を与えます。」
